kickoff_budget_note: This thread finished within the low-risk 8-task cap; no sprint-mode 10-task allowance or high-risk 4-task budget was used.
scope_goal: Build the FTS-first retrieval MVP with deterministic excerpt and provenance output for engine generation flows, aligned to ROADMAP.md Milestone 3 and PRODUCT_VISION.md capability 2.
scope_completed: Reviewed code commits f8a32d372301be4a7c67b97a66ddc8e04f36011f, c7ca5bcdb3a1b829712c4b3d2f3a39e2bd26c14f, 98ec3f4c0f475308b3ebb528551de923cba549ad, 1c01a74b58888f408e9fa1134a10a29478c6f39a, and cc16c21692b7ca4af9e7866a659b45fc18b87f63 keep SQLite FTS authoritative, export the canonical retrieval query constructor through both facades, and normalize retrieval payload snapshots so excerpt and provenance bundles stay deterministic.
tasks_completed: Added FTS provenance retrieval bundles and retrieval service support for deterministic excerpt/provenance output.
Exported the canonical retrieval query constructor through the engine and package facades.
Enforced FTS-only hit strategies while keeping PageIndex and embeddings fallback-only.
Normalized downstream retrieval payload snapshots so tuple-shaped query and policy data rehydrates deterministically.
